rectified_nodes.fix_description: Added data_flow edge from b1 to b4 (function) as its nearest downstream usage.
Added data_flow edge from b2 to b4 (function) as its nearest downstream usage.
Added data_flow edge from b3 to b4 (function) as its nearest downstream usage.
Added control_flow edge from b3 to b4 to make the function reachable, assuming b3 is the last declaration before the function call/definition.
Added data_flow edge from b4 (function) to b5 (return) to connect the return value, assuming the function produces the return value.
